items.title: VI Live: Vincius Júnior herstelt Huijsen-fout razendsnel voor Real Madrid
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er vier Eredivisie-duels op het programma. Voor Ajax tegen Fortuna Sittard is er een apart liveblog, voor de rest kun je terecht in deze VI Live. En uiteraard ook voor het belangrijkste voetbal in het buitenland.

items.title: Tonali inspires Newcastle to win over Villa in controversial cup tie
items.summary: Sandro Tonali scores twice as Newcastle United overcome multiple controversial refereeing decisions to knock 10-man Aston Villa out of the FA Cup.

items.title: AZ zet duel met Excelsior in extra tijd volledig op zijn kop
items.summary: AZ heeft het uitduel met Excelsior zaterdagavond op onnavolgbare wijze naar zich toegetrokken. Bij het ingaan van de extra tijd stond Excelsior met 1-0 voor, maar de Kralingers zagen hun ongeslagen reeks toch nog sneuvelen door doelpunten van Troy Parrott en Alexandre Penetra.

items.title: Liverpool v Brighton: FA Cup fourth round – live
items.summary: Updates from 8pm kickoff (GMT) at Anfield Follow us over on Bluesky | And get in touch: email Scott 1 min: Whigfield lied about the air. It’s a cold night on Merseyside. After an exuberant rendition of You’ll Never Walk Alone, Brighton get the ball rolling. They’re kicking towards the Kop in this first half. Continue reading...

items.title: Ronaldo zet nieuwe stap richting de duizend in veelbesproken rentree bij Al-Nassr
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo is bij zijn rentree meteen van waarde geweest voor Al-Nassr. De veelbesproken Portugees was verantwoordelijk voor de openingstreffer in het competitieduel met Al-Fateh.

items.title: Third-tier Mansfield oust Burnley in FA Cup shock
items.summary: Burnley were on the wrong end of an FA Cup upset as they were beaten 2-1 by Mansfield on Saturday.

items.title: Sandro Tonali double fires Newcastle through as 10-man Aston Villa pay price for Bizot red
items.summary: Football’s interminable video assistant refereeing debate has its latest chapter following a bizarre evening, and refereeing performance, at Villa Park. With the FA Cup not allowing the video protocol until the fifth round, here was an occasion to make the abolitionists think twice. Is elite football already too far gone to referee without a bank of screens in a faraway business park? Or was Chris Kavanagh, the referee, and his assistants, just having a nightmare day at the office? Sandro Tonali’s two goals, and Nick Woltemade’s clincher booked Newcastle’s fifth round place, completing a comeback that came in the face of officiating mistakes weighing against Eddie Howe’s team. Eventually, they prevailed over an Aston Villa team who lost discipline, and should have been down to ten men earlier than they eventually were. Continue reading...

items.title: Ronaldo ends protest, scores 18 mins later
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo returned to Al Nassr's lineup for Saturday's match at Al Fateh -- and swiftly scored.

items.title: Pep not happy with Man City's 'boring' FA Cup win
items.summary: Pep Guardiola branded Manchester City's routine FA Cup victory over Salford City on Saturday as "boring".

items.title: Tottenham appoint Igor Tudor as new head coach
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur have appointed Igor Tudor as their new head coach, the club have confirmed.

items.title: Kane nets 500th goal, Bayern cruise past Bremen
items.summary: Harry Kane scored twice to help Bayern Munich to a 3-0 win against Werder Bremen in the Bundesliga on Saturday.

items.title: VI Live: Fortuna Sittard maakt er toch weer een wedstrijd van tegen Ajax
items.summary: Ajax neemt het zaterdagavond om 20.00 uur op tegen Fortuna Sittard. De Amsterdammers hopen de draad weer op te pakken na het puntenverlies tegen Excelsior en AZ. Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in de VI Live.

items.title: Newcastle wint chaotisch FA Cup-duel: hoofdrol voor schlemiel Bizot en arbitrage
items.summary: Newcastle United is flink wat tegenslag te boven gekomen in de uitwedstrijd tegen Aston Villa. The Magpies bereikten de volgende ronde van het FA Cup-toernooi door na rood voor Villa-goalie Marco Bizot een achterstand om te buigen.

items.title: Brilliant Mansfield pile pressure on Parker - is his time up at Burnley?
items.summary: Burnley manager Scott Parker is under increasing pressure as the Premier League side are dumped out of the FA Cup by League One Mansfield.

items.title: Forever Young superb once again in Saudi Cup
items.summary: Forever Young created history when becoming the first dual winner of the world’s most valuable horse race, the Saudi Cup.

items.title: From 'demoralising' 8-0 defeat to pushing Man City all the way
items.summary: Thirteen months after being embarrassed 8-0 by Manchester City, Salford City produce a performance to make their fans proud.

items.title: Man City latest: Pep unimpressed by ‘boring’ FA Cup win over Salford
Kane reaches 500 goals - what other records could he break?
items.summary: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane became the first Englishman to reach 500 career goals on Saturday, but what other records could he break?

items.title: Reborn Scotland regain Calcutta Cup in England's latest Murrayfield nightmare
items.summary: Scotland unleashed another Murrayfield nightmare on England as they regained the Calcutta Cup - and eased the pressure on Gregor Townsend - with a 31-20 victory that extinguished their rivals' 12‑Test winning run.

items.title: Southampton and Norwich win all-Championship ties to progress in FA Cup
